description: Devpost — hackathon platform for project submissions, portfolios, and team collaboration

steps: Click 'Sign up with email' link to reveal email form
Click 'Sign up with email' submit button
MANUAL: Verify email via link in inbox

selectors.email_signup_button: button or a matching /sign up with email/i

steps: Select career status (Professional to skip school fields)
tips: Choose 'Professional (post grad)' to bypass school-required fields
Timezone: search for 'chennai' or 'kolkata' or 'new delhi' in select options

steps: Fill tagline, GitHub, website, Twitter fields
Click 'Add a new project' if on portfolio page
Fill tagline, description, built-with, try-it URL
MANUAL: May need reCAPTCHA solve again

selectors.add_project_button: a or button matching /add a new project/i

errors.context: Signup and project creation both have reCAPTCHA
errors.solution: Must be solved manually by user. Use browser_wait to poll for captcha_solved state, then continue automation after user solves it.

errors.error: Email signup form not visible / collapses back to social signup
errors.context: The signup page shows Google/GitHub buttons by default, email form is hidden
errors.solution: Click the 'Sign up with email' link first. If it collapses, force visibility via JS: find the container and set display:block
After setting el.value, dispatch both 'input' and 'change' events with bubbles:true. Or use browser_fill_form for CDP keyboard events.

errors.error: el.click() on submit button doesn't work
errors.context: Some Devpost buttons require real mouse events
errors.solution: Use browser_human_click with CSS selector, or browser_click (now uses CDP Input.dispatchMouseEvent)

errors.error: Onboarding has required fields that block Continue
errors.context: School fields are required if career status is 'Student'
errors.solution: Select 'Professional (post grad)' career status to bypass school-required fields entirely

errors.error: Project name save button hidden or disabled
errors.solution: Set saveBtn.style.display = 'inline-block' and saveBtn.disabled = false before clicking. Or submit the form directly.

errors.context: CDP targets a tab but native click targets screen coordinates — if Chrome shows a different tab, clicks hit wrong content
errors.solution: Always use browser_click or browser_human_click with CSS selector instead of native click with coordinates. Or ensure correct tab is focused with browser_navigate first.

errors.context: Sites with anti-bot detection check this flag
errors.solution: Call browser_stealth tool once after navigating to the site. It hides webdriver flag and patches plugins/languages/permissions.
